title.en: That's what I'm talking about! 내 말이 그 말이야!
title.ko: 내 말이 그 말이야! 진짜 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아!

description.en: When someone's opinion perfectly matches your own! Practice expressing strong agreement with 내 말이 그 말이야 and 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아.
description.ko: 상대방의 의견이 내 생각과 완벽하게 일치할 때! 내 말이 그 말이야와 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아를 사용해 격한 공감을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Strong Agreement. Empathy. Connection. Friendship. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. it's Friday! I was thinking we should go grab some spicy tteokbokki and fried chicken after work.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 내 말이 그 말이에요!
content.translation: Wow. John. that's exactly what I'm saying!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 저도 방금 딱 그 생각을 하고 있었거든요. 진짜 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아요!
content.translation: I was just thinking the exact same thing. It's like you really read my mind!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Great minds think alike! I already know a perfect place nearby.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 역시 우리 오늘 호흡이 척척 맞네요!
content.translation: As expected. we're perfectly in sync today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 말이 그 말이야. This sounds like I'm saying "My words are those words." right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 내가 하려던 말을 상대방이 먼저 했을 때 아주 반갑게 쓰는 표현이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It's an expression you use very gladly when someone says what you were about to say first.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "내 생각이 바로 그거야!" 라는 강한 긍정의 의미를 담고 있죠.
content.translation: It carries a strong positive meaning like "That's exactly my thought!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 말이 그 말이야.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 내 속마음을 들킨 것 같을 정도로 의견이 똑같을 때 써요.
content.translation: This is used when your opinions are so identical that it feels like your inner thoughts were discovered.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 상대방의 눈치나 센스가 정말 좋다고 칭찬하는 느낌도 줄 수 있어요.
content.translation: It can also give a feeling of complimenting the other person for having great intuition or sense.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아.
content.translation: You took the words right out of my mouth.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine we are discussing why we should take a break from social media for a few days.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 요즘 휴대폰을 너무 많이 봐서 그런지 눈도 아프고 마음도 피곤한 것 같아요.
content.translation: John. maybe because I look at my phone too much lately. my eyes hurt and my mind feels tired.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 우리 며칠 동안만이라도 소셜 미디어를 좀 끊어보는 게 어떨까요?
content.translation: How about we stop using social media at least for a few days?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 말이 그 말이에요! 저도 디지털 디톡스가 꼭 필요하다고 생각했어요.
content.translation: That's exactly what I'm saying! I also thought a digital detox was definitely necessary.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 정말요? 존은 소셜 미디어를 아주 좋아하는 줄 알았거든요.
content.translation: Really? I thought you liked social media a lot. John.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Not anymore. I want to focus more on real-life conversations.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와 진짜 제 마음을 읽은 것 같아요. 저도 같은 이유로 고민하고 있었거든요!
content.translation: Wow. you really read my mind. I was worrying about the same reason!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then it's settled. No phones during our dinner today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: It feels so good when you're on the same page with your friends.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 이렇게 격하게 공감해 주면 대화가 훨씬 더 즐거워지고 사이도 돈독해지죠.
content.translation: Right. When you empathize strongly like this. the conversation becomes much more enjoyable and the relationship grows stronger.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 주변 사람들의 의견에 시원하게 맞장구쳐 보세요!
content.translation: Try giving a refreshing reaction to people's opinions with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "strong agreement" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 내 말이 그 말이야! That's what I'm talking about!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 내 마음을 읽은 것 같아! You took the words right out of my mouth!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 바로 그거지! That's it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 나도 딱 그 생각 했어! I was thinking the exact same thing!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 완전 공감해! I totally relate!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가와 마음이 통하는 기분 좋은 대화 나누시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a pleasant conversation where you feel connected with someone today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 친구의 슬픔에 깊이 공감했어요. (I deeply empathized with my friend's sadness.)
미나가 내 말에 맞장구를 잘 쳐줘서 신이 났어요. (I was excited because Mina chimed in well with what I said.)
우리 팀은 서로 호흡이 아주 잘 맞아요. (Our team is in great sync with each other.)
가끔은 내 속마음을 솔직하게 말하는 게 필요해요. (Sometimes it's necessary to speak your true feelings honestly.)
그의 뛰어난 센스에 모두가 감탄했어요. (Everyone admired his excellent sense.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be close. To be strong
vocabulary.example: 우리는 오랜 시간 동안 돈독한 우정을 쌓아왔어요. (We have built a strong friendship over a long period of time.)
